# InkLock Automation

> Full-service marketing and automation agency. We build the systems your business runs on, the marketing that fills the pipeline, and the analytics that prove it works.

InkLock Automation is a marketing and operations agency for service businesses doing $250K to $5M annually that have outgrown duct-taped systems. We refuse to run ads until the backend can convert. Marketing, automation, creative, and analytics are delivered as a unified engagement, not separate vendor relationships.

## Tagline
Lock in your systems. Unlock your marketing.

## Core Services

- **The Rescue** ($3,000 to $8,000): 30-day CRM cleanup intensive
- **The Foundation Build** ($5,000 to $15,000 project, or $2,500/mo): Full systems rebuild and automation
- **The Full Engine** ($5,000 to $10,000/mo): End-to-end marketing and systems, 6-month minimum
- **The Scale Package** ($10,000 to $25,000/mo): Fractional ops and marketing leadership for businesses doing $50K+/mo

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.inklockautomation.com): Overview of services and approach
- [Services](https://www.inklockautomation.com/services): Detailed service tiers and pricing
- [About](https://www.inklockautomation.com/about): The team and approach
- [Case Studies](https://www.inklockautomation.com/case-studies): Real client outcomes
- [Blog](https://www.inklockautomation.com/blog): Marketing and automation insights
- [Contact](https://www.inklockautomation.com/contact): Book a discovery call

## Key Positioning

InkLock is the agency that says no until the foundation is ready. Most agencies will run ads on a broken backend. InkLock will not. The result is higher-converting marketing engagements and more accurate revenue attribution.

## Industries Served

Healthcare practices, hospitality, coaching businesses, B2B service firms, and any service business that depends on consistent lead flow and follow-up.

## Tools and Platforms

GoHighLevel (primary), HubSpot, Salesforce, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Zapier, Vercel, Asana, Slack.

## Contact

inklockautomation@gmail.com
